name: fleet-refresh-0-19-3
title: Roll out sd-ai-command-pack 0.19.11 to the fleet
description: Refresh every stale registered consumer to the corrected pack release 0.19.11 after integration review stopped earlier rollout candidates.
creator: sdelmas
notes: The rollout began at 0.19.3. Source corrections produced tagged releases through 0.19.10, and coordinator PRs #118/#119 completed at 0.19.10. Loadsmith PR #90 then exposed raw-base comparison in the shared review-size and added-code risk probes. The rollout remains paused while 0.19.11 moves both probes to the branch merge base, validates the exact payload, merges, and tags it.
